name: Sleep Timer
description: Pauses your active playback sessions after a chosen duration (1, 15, 30, 60, or 120 minutes). Reaches the UI via a Tampermonkey/Violentmonkey userscript or an optional static-file edit of jellyfin-web - no JS Injector / File Transformation dependency, so HLS playback is untouched.
overview: Sleep timer that pauses all your active sessions after N minutes.
